required_writes.description: WHO_AM_I read (0x75) — driver must read the ID register to identify the MPU6050 (expected 0x68). A driver that skips this cannot detect device presence / wiring errors.

PWR_MGMT_1 (0x6B) write with the sleep bit (bit 6) cleared. The chip boots into sleep mode; drivers must write here to wake it. Common wake values: 0x00 (internal 8 MHz osc), 0x01 (PLL gyro X), 0x02 (PLL gyro Y), 0x03 (PLL gyro Z), 0x08 (disable temp sensor + internal osc).

ACCEL_XOUT_H register pointer (0x3B). Driver must read the 6-byte accel burst starting at 0x3B, or the whole 14-byte sensor block at the same base. Without this read the driver produces no accel data.
